Mails.Title: Welcome to AscNet [欢迎来到 AscNet]
Mails.Content: Hello Commandant! Welcome to AscNet, we are happy that you are using this Server Software. This Server Software is always free and if you are paying to gain access to this you are being SCAMMED. 欢迎来到 AscNet，我们很高兴您使用本服务器软件。 本服务器软件始终是免费的，如果您是通过付费来使用本软件，那您就被骗了。
